deviations.what: Wall-break for NAMED MODELS: the original uses a separate 'img' JSON model for the image src ({img>/products/pic1}) alongside the default model for the widths. abap2UI5 keeps all data in one default model; the frontend (view1_js) now aliases that model under every {name>} prefix the view uses, so {img>...} resolves to the same flat data. The image path is a single flat field (pic1) instead of the original's /products/pic1 nesting (last-segment identical). Widths use the desktop values (the original's phone branch is a client-only Device decision).
